title: ononis alopecuroides subsp. simulata
intro: Ononis alopecuroides subsp. simulata, also known as a type of sainfoin or a perennial legume, is a plant species within the genus Ononis. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, offering several health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Ononis alopecuroides subsp. simulata is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
